status: prepared before any V23 arm or judge inference
estimand: compact C3 treatment package versus compact standardized neutral baseline

judging.packet_scope: three anonymous compact claim-only pairs; no repository or tools
judging.resolution: agreement is accepted; gold disagreement becomes not_supported; forbidden disagreement becomes supported
judging.primary_score: supported gold claims divided by registered gold claim count
judging.blocking_false_claim_count: contradicted gold claims plus supported forbidden claims

analysis.direction: C3 treatment package minus neutral baseline
analysis.small_sample_rule: Report point estimate and all three pair effects. Do not claim population certainty.

stopping_rule: Stop on an invalid arm, cumulative admission failure, missing judge output, judge ceiling breach, privacy breach, or protocol deviation. Do not rerun or substitute. Pass only when all three pairs are valid, both judges complete, lift is at least 0.20, false-claim lift is at most 0, and all walls hold.
